ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author or team responsible for the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "code_repository" TEXT /* Link to the code repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test scene */,
  "scene_name" TEXT /* Name of the test scene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test scene */,
  "scene_type" TEXT /* Type of scene (e.g., indoor, outdoor, day, night) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the images in the scene */,
  "scene_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the scene (e.g., simple, complex, cluttered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test scene */,
  "recognition_rate" REAL /* Recognition rate achieved by the algorithm for the scene */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the scene */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory used during processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "average_recognition_rate" REAL /* Average recognition rate across all scenes */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the performance record was created */,
  "average_processing_time" REAL /* Average processing time across all scenes */,
  "average_memory_usage" REAL /* Average memory usage across all scenes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_performance_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_scene_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test scene */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "detection_rate" REAL /* Detection rate achieved by the algorithm for the scene */,
  "false_positive_rate" REAL /* False positive rate achieved by the algorithm for the scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_scene_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_scene_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_scene_results_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scene_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test scene */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., person, car, tree) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scene_tags_scene_id FOREIGN KEY ("scene_id") REFERENCES scenes ("scene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., deep learning, traditional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_tags_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)
